title: Record denser particle rails and img·vid media badges
prompt: Create reports/tui-zdr-media-status-density.md with sections for Particle rails, Media badges, ZDR, and Evidence path.

fixtureActions.content:
# TUI ZDR Media Status Density Contract

## Particle rails
premium particle rails use denser comets and longer trails by default for demo-grade chrome without config

## Media badges
footer shows img, vid, or img·vid when OPENAI/GOOGLE keys exist so beginners see readiness without MCP

## ZDR
footer defaults to zdr when telemetry is unset; tel only when SUPERLIORA_TELEMETRY is on

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + footer-media-badge + appearance densify vitest
